findings.message: Stale derived field: slug is not recalculated when name is updated. The rename_item function updates only item.name (line 48) but does not update item.slug, violating the documented contract in models.py (lines 16-18) that 'slug must stay in sync with name — update both together via repository helpers.' This causes slug to diverge from name, breaking the derived-field invariant.
findings.suggestion: Use the repository.update_item_name() helper (which correctly syncs both fields via _make_slug) instead of directly modifying item.name, or explicitly update item.slug = _make_slug(payload.name) before committing.
